title: Oh My Posh Theme Config
description: Maps Windows Terminal profiles to Oh My Posh themes for the smart PowerShell profile. Used to select a per-profile prompt theme, falling back to a default.

$schema.description: URL of this schema, enabling editor autocomplete and validation.

profileThemeMap.description: Map of Windows Terminal profile GUID to Oh My Posh theme name. Each key is a braced GUID as it appears in the Windows Terminal profile definition; each value is the theme name (without the .omp.json extension).

additionalProperties.description: Oh My Posh theme name (matches an *.omp.json file, without the extension).

defaultTheme.description: Theme name used when the active Windows Terminal profile has no entry in profileThemeMap.
